./artifacts/api-stability/20251124T000000Z/ui-smoke/20251124T073245Z-msw-headful.har:            "text": "import { buildSafetyNotes } from \"/src/features/patients/utils/safety-notes.ts\";\nimport { httpClient } from \"/src/libs/http/index.ts\";\nexport const normalizePatientVisit = (resource) => {\n  const visitId = resource.id ?? 0;\n  const patientModel = resource.patientModel;\n  const patientPk = patientModel?.id ?? 0;\n  const patientId = patientModel?.patientId?.trim();\n  const fullName = patientModel?.fullName?.trim();\n  if (!visitId || !patientPk || !patientId || !fullName) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  const safetyNotes = buildSafetyNotes([\n    patientModel?.appMemo,\n    patientModel?.reserve1,\n    patientModel?.reserve2,\n    patientModel?.reserve3,\n    patientModel?.reserve4,\n    patientModel?.reserve5,\n    patientModel?.reserve6,\n    resource.memo\n  ]);\n  return {\n    visitId,\n    facilityId: resource.facilityId ?? void 0,\n    visitDate: resource.pvtDate ?? void 0,\n    state: resource.state ?? 0,\n    memo: resource.memo ?? void 0,\n    insuranceUid: resource.insuranceUid ?? void 0,\n    departmentCode: resource.deptCode ?? resource.department ?? void 0,\n    departmentName: resource.deptName ?? void 0,\n    doctorId: resource.doctorId ?? void 0,\n    doctorName: resource.doctorName ?? void 0,\n    jmariNumber: resource.jmariNumber ?? void 0,\n    patientPk,\n    patientId,\n    fullName,\n    kanaName: patientModel?.kanaName ?? void 0,\n    gender: patientModel?.gender ?? void 0,\n    birthday: patientModel?.birthday ?? void 0,\n    ownerUuid: patientModel?.ownerUUID ?? null,\n    safetyNotes,\n    raw: resource\n  };\n};\nexport const fetchPatientVisits = async () => {\n  const response = await httpClient.get(\"/pvt2/pvtList\");\n  const list = response.data?.list ?? [];\n  return list.map(normalizePatientVisit).filter((visit) => Boolean(visit));\n};\nconst toOptionalString = (value) => {\n  if (value === null || value === void 0) {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n  return String(value);\n};\nexport const fetchChartsPatientList = async (params) => {\n  const response = await httpClient.get(\n    \"/charts/patientList\",\n    {\n      params: params?.clientUuid ? { clientUUID: params.clientUuid } : void 0\n    }\n  );\n  const list = response.data?.list ?? [];\n  const visits = list.map(normalizePatientVisit).filter((visit) => Boolean(visit));\n  return {\n    visits,\n    sequence: toOptionalString(response.data?.sequence),\n    gapSize: typeof response.data?.gapSize === \"number\" ? response.data?.gapSize : void 0\n  };\n};\n\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,"

[];\n  return list.map(normalizePatientVisit).filter((visit) => Boolean(visit));\n};\nconst toOptionalString = (value) => {\n  if (value === null || value === void 0) {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n  return String(value);\n};\nexport const fetchChartsPatientList = async (params) => {\n  const response = await httpClient.get(\n    \"/charts/patientList\",\n    {\n      params: params?.clientUuid ? { clientUUID: params.clientUuid } : void 0\n    }\n  );\n  const list = response.data?.list ?? [];\n  const visits = list.map(normalizePatientVisit).filter((visit) => Boolean(visit));\n  return {\n    visits,\n    sequence: toOptionalString(response.data?.sequence),\n    gapSize: typeof response.data?.gapSize === \"number\" ? response.data?.gapSize : void 0\n  };\n};\n\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,"

d_facility facilitymo2_ on usermodel1_.facility_id=facilitymo2_.id left outer join d_roles roles3_ on usermodel1_.id=roles3_.c_user inner join d_karte kartebean4_ on
